summary: Excellent audience recording captures a great concert, hailed as the best‑sounding tape in the collection.
review: The single review praises this show as a "great concert" and highlights the audio quality, calling it the best‑sounding audience (aud) source available. While no specific songs or performance details are mentioned, the overall impression is strongly positive for both the music and the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed 4‑star review; reviewer rates both concert and sound highly, leading to a solid but not perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced audience recording praised as the best‑sounding tape in this set of releases.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall great concert; no specific issues or standout moments detailed beyond general praise.
